SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION
SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION

Immigration Lawyers Miami, FL
Have an American Dream? We Can Help.
Are you overwhelmed by the stress of your immigration problem? Let us hold your hand and carry the burden for you. We specialize in Complex Green Card cases, Waivers, and Marriage and Fiance Visas, allowing us to reunite and keep your family together. Immigration Lawyers USA in Miami helps our clients achieve their American dream by a simple formula: applying our expertise and paying close attention to the details to solve your immigration problem.

SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION

A Team You Can Trust
Our immigration lawyers have the expertise to win your case
3500 +
Cases Won

97% +
Complex Green Card Cases Won

99% +
Marriage and Fiance Visa Cases Won

280+
5-Star Google Reviews

Get Reunited with your Foreign Spouse without the Stress and Headache

Steps Towards Achieving Your American Dream

1. Onboard
A member of our Cares Team will call you to share expectations on evidence gathering, instructions on how to use our software to efficiently complete your forms, and our internal deadlines.

2. Quality Control Review
Three members of our legal team will review each line of your form and the evidence included to ensure it's accurate and legally sufficient.  We also double check the mailing address, fee amounts, form versions, that there are no missing pages or boxes, and that all questions are answered to prevent your case from being rejected. You will also review the forms to agree your information is correct before we file.

3. File Your Case
We will file your case before the time period ends in the service level you select. Max level is 30 days for family-based cases. Pro service level is 60 days. We also offer Expedited or Rush service when you need a case filed as soon as possible.  We understand that the government can be slow and inefficient, which is why we are intentional in doing our part to file your application package in a timely manner.

4. Monitor Case
After we file, we will update you on what to expect as we await your interview or approval notice.  If your case goes outside of normal processing times, we will help you file a claim to pressure the government to decide your case. Once you receive the case decision, we will help you understand next steps and celebrate with you!

Why Choose Immigration Lawyers USA

We understand you have many options for your legal team. Regardless, many of our clients tell us it’s a breath of fresh air to meet our team. Below are some of the reasons we stand out from other immigration law firms.

We are honest with our clients
We will tell you up front if we can or cannot help you and will be transparent about your chances of success and the cost for the entire case. If we cannot help you, it’s valuable for you to know this so you don’t waste money on filing with a lawyer or notary who might pull the wool over your eyes.

We pay close attention to details
Details really matter in immigration law, which is administrative law. The evidence you send and the completion and accuracy of the information on your forms matters to government officials deciding your case. You could get your case rejected, delayed or denied over one incorrectly marked box. We will help you file the information and evidence that is crucial to solving your immigration problem.

You always have access to the lawyer throughout your case
You will have a member of our Cares Team assisting you with your case preparation; but should you ever have a legal question or doubt or concern about your case, you can schedule a face-to-face meeting with me to address your questions and concerns.

Have an Immigration Problem? Contact Us to Schedule your Immigration Strategy

SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION
SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION

Alicia Morgan
Immigration Lawyer and Owner

At Immigration Lawyers USA, we believe that building a strong and trusting relationship with your lawyer is paramount to achieving success in your legal matters.
Attorney Alicia Morgan is more than just a lawyer; she's a compassionate and skilled advocate who goes the extra mile to understand your unique circumstances. Here are some key details about her:
Background : She completed her high school education with distinction, achieving a flawless 4.0 G.P.A., driven by a strong desire to make a positive impact on the world. She continued her academic journey by pursuing a dual Bachelor's degree in Spanish and Print Journalism at Murray State University in Kentucky for her undergraduate studies, graduating with the highest honors: summa cum laude. During her time at the university, she was honored twice as the Best Spanish Student by the Modern Language Department.  She later attended West Virginia University College of Law, where she served as a student lawyer in the Immigration Law Clinic.  She stays active in her church, volunteering for Christ Fellowship Kids ministry and attending a small group.  She has been involved in numerous committees annually for the South Florida Chapter of the American Immigration Lawyers Association, including the Continuing Legal Education Administration Committee, New Member Division, Unauthorized Practice of Lawand the DMV Committee. She currently serves on the Wellness Committee and DMV Committee. She loves traveling, learning languages, snorkeling, and spending time with her family, including her husband and two young children.
Passion for the Law : Attorney Morgan knew in 7th grade she wanted to be a lawyer. She takes pleasure in advocating for her clients in intricate family-based petitions, including unlawful presence, crime, and fraud waivers. Her expertise extends to defending against deportation, covering cancellation of removal for both non-legal permanent residents and legal permanent residents, as well as handling adjustment of status and prosecutorial discretion cases. Additionally, she excels in processing U visa, VAWA, TPS, DACA applications, as well as naturalization cases and E2 investment visas.
Client-Centered Approach : Attorney Alicia Morgan prides herself on her client-centered approach. She believes that the key to success in legal matters is a strong attorney-client relationship. She takes the time to listen to her clients, understand their concerns, and craft tailored legal strategies to meet their needs.
Communication, Empathy and Support : She ensures that her clients are always well-informed about the progress of their cases, explaining legal intricacies in a clear and understandable manner. She provides the empathy and support that clients need during these difficult times, making the legal process as smooth and stress-free as possible.
Track Record : She has a proven track record of success in her field. She has successfully represented numerous clients in a variety of cases, earning their trust and achieving positive outcomes.

Have An American Dream? Immigration Lawyers USA Can Help.

Our Immigration lawyers are here to help you.  We are conveniently located in between Downtown Miami and North Miami, Florida on Biscayne Blvd., just a few miles West of Miami Beach. Contact us below to schedule a confidental strategy session.

SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION
SCHEDULE A STRATEGY SESSION

Our Team
Meet our team of experts who will help you win your case.

Meet our CARES (Client Advocates Reaching for Excellent Service) Team. We are a dedicated team working together to help achieve positive results for you in an efficient manner, leveraging the power of systems and technology. We are always available to answer your questions and help build your strongest case, with great attention to details. You will have a CARES member assigned to your case, but anytime you have a legal question or any concerns our Cares Team cannot adequately address, you will have access to and the ability to meet with Attorney Morgan.

Our Core Values:
EXCELLENCE . We pay attention to details and always try to make the case as strong as possible, with the goal to win the case.
INTEGRITY . We don’t cut corners and we are honest. We do things the correct and ethical way. We expect honesty from our clients, and we will be honest with you to help you understand your chances for success.
KINDNESS . We practice the Golden Rule at our law firm. We are kind and respectful to our clients, and we expect the same kindness and respect in return.
EFFICIENCY . We understand that time is money.  Because we value your time and ours, we leverage technology to complete your case in a streamlined, efficient manner.

I'd like to thank you again for visiting our website and I look forward to fighting hard for your unique case.
Are We a Good Fit?
Who We Can Help: People who are truthful about the facts of their case and with our team.  We also require respect, kindness and collaboration of our clients to prepare the best case for you in an efficient manner.
Who We Cannot Help: We don’t handle every case type, and we also take a limited number of new cases each month. We do not currently handle asylum cases in court, tourist and student visas. Further, we do not work with people who cannot dedicate the time to make their case successful. We strive for customer service and approval on your case.  With that in mind, we recommend you schedule a Strategy Session with us to better decide if we are a good fit to help you achieve your American Dream.

Have An American Dream? Immigration Lawyers USA Can Help.

Our Immigration lawyers are here to help you.  We are conveniently located in between Downtown Miami and North Miami, Florida on Biscayne Blvd., just a few miles West of Miami Beach. Contact us below to schedule a confidental strategy session.
